response: Japan has a population of 125 million people and a GDP of $4.2 trillion, which is currently experiencing a growth rate of 1.1%. The nation maintains a low unemployment rate of 2.6% and an inflation rate of 3.2%, though it faces a high debt-to-GDP ratio of 263%. Additionally, Japan boasts a life expectancy of 84.6 years and generates $756 billion in exports.
